_comment: Provenance for the vendored Form.io type snapshot in component-types.ts. The step-03 diff job (corpus/refresh.mjs, Job B) compares KNOWN_FORMIO_COMPONENT_TYPES against upstream at the ref below and alerts on any new builtin type. Bump `ref` + `capturedFrom` when the snapshot is refreshed; never hand-edit component-types.ts to silence an alarm.
note: Content-free: this file lists type identifiers only, never any user form content.
